title: Run Fediverse Pasture inbox robustness vectors
description: Feed 93+ Pasture vectors (codeberg.org/funfedidev/fediverse-pasture-inputs) into Broadside's inbox. Real-world AP payloads from Misskey, Pleroma, GoToSocial plus edge cases (100KB bodies, deep nesting, null fields). Criterion: inbox must never 500.
